events.title: Visual Studio IntelliCode announced
events.summary: Microsoft brings AI-assisted IntelliSense to Visual Studio.

events.title: Tabnine launches first AI code assistant
events.summary: First dedicated AI code completion tool ships as standalone IDE extension.

events.title: GitHub Copilot technical preview
events.summary: LLM-powered code generation enters the IDE at scale, powered by OpenAI Codex.

events.title: OpenAI Codex research paper published
events.summary: The model behind Copilot described in academic literature (arXiv:2107.03374).

events.title: GitHub Copilot generally available
events.summary: Copilot goes paid ($10/mo) — free for students and OSS maintainers.

events.title: ChatGPT introduced
events.summary: OpenAI's chat interface goes viral, broadening AI coding beyond IDEs.

events.title: ChatGPT plugins + Code Interpreter announced
events.summary: ChatGPT gains ability to execute code in sandbox — first hint of agentic capability.

events.title: Codex models deprecated in OpenAI API
events.summary: GPT-3.5/4 prove capable enough for code without a specialized model.

events.title: Stack Overflow: 43.8% AI tool adoption
events.summary: First major benchmark — 89,184 respondents. The baseline for future comparisons.

events.title: SWE-bench published (Princeton)
events.summary: The benchmark that defines the agentic era — 2,294 real GitHub issues.

events.title: Sourcegraph Cody GA
events.summary: AI coding assistant leveraging deep code search for codebase-aware context.

events.title: Devin announced — 'first AI software engineer'
events.summary: Cognition Labs demos autonomous coding agent. Goes viral — and polarizes industry.

events.title: Google Gemini Code Assist launches
events.summary: Duet AI rebranded at Cloud Next 2024. Powered by Gemini 1.5 Pro.

events.title: Augment Code emerges from stealth — $252M raised
events.summary: Enterprise-focused AI coding startup at $977M valuation.

events.title: Amazon Q Developer GA
events.summary: AWS rebrands CodeWhisperer → Q Developer, expanding to full-lifecycle assistant.

events.title: GitHub Copilot Workspace technical preview
events.summary: Issue-to-PR workflow: AI brainstorms, plans, implements, and validates.

events.title: Stack Overflow 2024: adoption jumps to 61.8%
events.summary: 65,437 respondents — 18-point rise year-over-year.

events.title: EU AI Act enters into force
events.summary: World's most comprehensive AI regulation begins phased enforcement.

events.title: Cursor raises $165M across Series A & B
events.summary: $60M at $400M (Aug), then $105M at $2.5B (Dec) — 6x in four months.

events.title: Replit Agent launches
events.summary: Autonomous agent building complete apps from natural language.

events.title: Windsurf launches agentic IDE
events.summary: Codeium launches 'first agentic IDE' combining copilot and agent paradigms.

events.title: JetBrains Junie announced
events.summary: JetBrains enters the agent race with an IDE-embedded coding agent.

events.title: Claude Code research preview
events.summary: Anthropic introduces agentic CLI tool alongside Claude 3.7 Sonnet.

events.title: GitHub Copilot agent mode preview
events.summary: Copilot gains autonomous multi-step capability in VS Code Insiders.

events.title: EU AI Act: prohibited practices enforceable
events.summary: First enforcement phase — organizations must comply with banned practices.

events.title: Devin 2.0 — price drops $500 to $20/month
events.summary: Cognition slashes pricing, signaling mass-market accessibility.

events.title: Tabnine sunsets free tier
events.summary: Enterprise-only pivot; named Gartner Magic Quadrant Visionary.

events.title: OpenAI Codex agent research preview
events.summary: Cloud-based agent writing features, fixing bugs, proposing PRs autonomously.

events.title: GitHub Copilot coding agent public preview
events.summary: Autonomous agent: takes issue, spins up environment, opens draft PR.

events.title: Claude Code reaches general availability
events.summary: GA on May 22. Reaches ~$1B ARR by November 2025.

events.title: OpenAI–Windsurf acquisition collapses
events.summary: $3B deal (May) falls apart (Jul). Google signs $2.4B licensing deal.

events.title: Stack Overflow 2025: 78.5% using, 46% distrust
events.summary: 49,009 respondents. The paradox crystallizes: heavy usage, low trust.

events.title: Cursor raises $900M at $9.9B
events.summary: Series C. Hit $500M ARR (May) → $1B ARR (Oct). Fastest SaaS ever.

events.title: EU AI Act: GPAI model obligations take effect
events.summary: Foundation model providers must supply technical docs, comply with copyright.

events.title: Claude Code v2.0 — subagents, hooks, Agent SDK
events.summary: Architecture upgrade: checkpoints, subagents, background tasks. Powered by Sonnet 4.5.

events.title: Cursor 2.0 + multi-agent interface
events.summary: Multiple AI agents collaborating on different parts of a codebase.

events.title: Devin: 67% PR merge rate, 4× faster
events.summary: PR merges doubled YoY. Goldman Sachs pilots hybrid workforce with 20% gains.

events.title: Claude Cowork announced
events.summary: Anthropic extends agentic paradigm from coding to general knowledge work.

events.title: METR: Agent time horizons doubling every ~89 days
events.summary: Time Horizon 1.1: 50% success threshold jumped from ~4 min (2024) to hours (late 2025).

events.title: Microsoft: 4.7M paid Copilot subscribers
events.summary: FY26 Q2 earnings. '20M users' and '90% Fortune 100' also cited.

events.title: Claude Opus 4.6 — 12-hour time horizon
events.summary: 1M context (beta), 128K output. METR: ~719 min time horizon. 75.6% SWE-bench.

events.title: GPT-5.3-Codex + desktop app
events.summary: Demo: 25-hour uninterrupted session, 30K lines of code. 2M+ weekly active users.

events.title: Cursor hits $2B ARR
events.summary: Revenue doubles in 3 months. Enterprise ~60% of revenue. Raising at $50B.

events.title: Codex Security research preview
events.summary: OpenAI extends Codex platform into automated security analysis.

events.title: Claude Computer Use + Dispatch
events.summary: Phone-to-desktop dispatch: assign tasks remotely, agents run autonomously.

events.title: Gartner: 75% enterprise engineers forecast
events.summary: Forward-looking projection from 2024 — up from <10% in early 2023.
